daily.today_energy: The universe is giving you main character energy today. Your intuition is sharp, and honestly, trust those gut feelings—they're not lying to you. Channel that Scorpio intensity into something creative.
daily.love: Whether you're coupled up or solo, there's a vibe shift happening. If you've been holding back from saying something real, today feels like the right moment. Vulnerability hits different when it's authentic.
daily.career: Your focus is unmatched right now. That project or goal you've been thinking about? The energy supports taking a concrete step forward. You've got the momentum—use it wisely and watch what unfolds.
daily.health: Your body's asking for balance today. That could mean moving in a way that feels good, hydrating more, or just giving yourself permission to rest without the guilt. Listen to what you actually need, not what you think you should do.

weekly.overview: This week's energy is all about shedding what no longer serves you, Scorpio. Mercury's vibes are pushing you toward clarity and honest conversations. Trust your gut—it's been right before and it's right now.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled up or solo, vulnerability is your superpower rn. Someone might surprise you with their depth. Don't overthink the signals; sometimes the simplest explanation hits different.
weekly.career: Your creative problem-solving is chef's kiss this week. A project or idea you've been sitting on deserves attention. Low-key confidence moves will get you further than big declarations.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for grounding activities—maybe walks, stretching, or something that connects you to the earth. Pay attention to what makes you feel solid and peaceful, not just productive.
